manual_memories.content: Repo migration complete: use GitHub as primary remote and CI. origin=git@github.com:JackReis/rib-recovery-dashboard.git. GitLab remote is legacy only; do not push there unless explicitly requested.

realtime_memories.content:

**For GitHub Pages
